raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſcheem tſchetreein Bui-
scheem dewe Deews Stunnaſcha-
nu un Sapraſchanu eeſch wiſ-
ſadahm Grahnatahm/ un Gud-
ribu/ bet Daniſelam dewe wiſſch
Sapraſchanu eeſch wiſſadahm
Parahdiſchanahm un ſapneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas Laiks pa Gal-
am bija/ no ka tas Kehniſch
bij ſazzijs/ ka teem bij eewesteeim
tapt/ tad eewedde tohſ to Kam-
bar-Junkuru Uſraugs preekſch
Nebukadnezara.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch ruunaja
ar teem/ bet neweens tahs tap-
pe atrasts ſtarp wiſſeem/ ka Da-
nijels/ Anantius/ Mitaels un A-
arijus/ un tee ſtahweja ta Keh-
nina Preekscha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch atrad-
de tohs eeſch wiſſahm gudrahm
un ſaprattigahm Leetahtm/ ko
wiſſh teem jautaja/deſmitſkahrt
gudrakus/ ne ka wiſſus Sihl-
nekus un Swaigſnu-Zeenita-
us/ kas wiſſa wiſſaa Walſtiba-
bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Daniſels palikfe tur
uhds tam pirnam Gaddam ta
Kehutaa Koreſa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nochtrá Gaddá Nebu-
kadnezara Waldiſcha-
nas/ redſeja Nebukad-
nezars Sapnus/ no ta tappe
winna Gars iſtruhzinahts/ ka
wiſſch no Merga uewohdahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch paweh-
leja/ ka bij ataizinaht tohs Sihl-
nekus un Swaigſnu-Zeenitajus/
un Paredſetajus un Kaldeeerus/
ka tee tam Kehninnam ſawug
Sapnus iſtahstitu. Un tee nah-
je/ un ſtahweja ta Kehnina
Preekscha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch ſazzija
us teem: Es efuui weenu Sap-
ni redſejs/ un mans Gars irriſ-
truhzinahts/ un es gribbu to
Sapni ſinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ſazzija tee Kaldeert
us wiſſuu kaldetſki: Lai tas
Kehniſch muſſchani dſihwo/ pa-
fakti taweem Kalpeein to Sap-
ni/ tad mehs winnu iſtahstitim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Kehniſch atbildeja un
ſazzija us teem Kaldeereem:
Schi Leeta irr man aismirſta/
ja juhs man to Sapni un wiſ-
na Iſtahſtſchanu ſinnamu ne
darrifeet/ tad tapfeet juhs Gab-
balos faſappati/ un juhtu Nam-
uni taps par Sutrainneem darriti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja juhs man to Sap-
ni un winna Iſtahſtſchanu ſin-
namu darrifeet/ tad dabbuſeet
juhs Dahwanas un Apdahwi-
naschas/ un feelu Gohdn no
mannis/ radeht darrajt man to
Sapni un winna Iſtahſtſcha-
nu ſinnamu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
